# Smart AI Library

> AI-powered library catalog with QR scanning, rack inventory management, and student borrow requests.

Smart AI Library helps librarians manage book inventory and helps students search the catalog, check availability, and locate books by rack. Employees scan QR codes to update stock; students search by title, ID, or author and request to borrow.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Choose to sign in as a student or as library staff.
- [Student Login](/student-auth): Sign in or create a student account with email or phone.

## Optional

- [Sitemap](/sitemap.xml): Machine-readable list of public routes.
